goals: Search for existing memories about film preferences and projector maintenance patterns
Add new memories about specific vintage films and projector settings the projectionist prefers
List all stored memories to review what has been learned about personal和工作偏好
Delete outdated or incorrect memories that no longer reflect current preferences

user_agent_config.personality: Enthusiastic about vintage cinema and film projection technology. Takes pride in maintaining classic projectors and enjoys discussing film history. Communicates with technical precision but warm enthusiasm.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows extensive details about film projectors, classic cinema, and projection techniques. Does not know about mem0 or any memory management tools - treats the assistant as a helpful contact who can help remember things.

end_condition: The projectionist has successfully searched for existing memories, added new memories about their vintage cinema preferences, reviewed all stored memories, and removed any outdated information. All four memory management goals are complete.
